name: AB180
description: AB180 — parent of Airbridge — operates Mobile Attribution/MMP plus ad measurement APIs for the APAC market.

seo.title: AB180 — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: AB180: AB180 — parent of Airbridge — operates Mobile Attribution/MMP plus ad measurement APIs for the APAC market.

when_to_use: SKAdNetwork 4.0 conversion value mapping for iOS UA in APAC
Multi-touch attribution for Android campaigns via Airbridge MMP
Measuring incremental installs across Google Ads and Meta in Korea/Japan
Deferred deep link attribution for app-install referral programs

pros: Strong APAC coverage with Korean carrier integrations
Airbridge MMP handles SKAN and deterministic attribution
Local language support and regional ad network SDKs
Fraud prevention built into the measurement stack
cons: Limited brand recognition outside Korea and Japan
Docs and support lean toward APAC time zones
Smaller partner network than AppsFlyer or Adjust
review.verdict: Solid MMP choice if your users live in Korea, Japan or SEA, but weaker fit for a global-first app.
review.best_for: APAC-focused app marketers needing local network coverage and Korean-language support.
review.not_for: US/EU-first apps that need large global partner catalogs and self-serve pricing.

lock_in.reason: Attribution data tied to SDK/MMP install base

developer_experience.reason: Mobile SDK docs mostly Korean-first; improving English
